title: AlloyDB AI: Revolutionizing Hybrid Search for PostgreSQL
summary: AlloyDB AI extends PostgreSQL with hybrid search combining keyword and vector search. It supports generating millions of embeddings via ai.initialize_embeddings, scales to 10B+ vectors using ScaNN, and integrates Gemini functions like ai.summarize and ai.generate for SQL-native AI operations.
